title: Aashiqui 2
tmdbOverview: A young woman meets a failing musician who launches her singing career, but their relationship is doomed when people assume he's with her for her fame and fortune.
synopsis: Aashiqui 2 (2013) is a drama and romance film from India. It holds a solid 7.1 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a U certification (IN rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
